name: proofcast
description: Proof-before-deploy engine for AI agents: record a video demo of a feature, then deploy only after implicit user validation.

scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run examples/signup
scripts.test: tsc && node --test test/onboarding.test.mjs test/config.test.mjs test/ai.test.mjs test/context-analyzer.test.mjs test/orchestrator.test.mjs test/prover.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/tools.test.mjs test/agent.test.mjs test/planner.test.mjs test/skills.test.mjs test/github.test.mjs test/daemon.test.mjs test/sandbox.test.mjs test/video.test.mjs test/deployer.test.mjs test/bot.test.mjs test/integration.test.mjs test/example.test.mjs test/path-resolver.test.mjs test/memory.test.mjs test/setup.test.mjs test/readme.test.mjs test/agents.test.mjs
